description: You are a medical writer at a contract research organization (CRO) responsible for formatting a Phase III clinical trial protocol for a KRAS G12C NSCLC study ('oncology_protocol_raw.docx') to ICH E6(R2) GCP standards. Apply 'Heading 1' style to the eight top-level section headers: 'PROTOCOL SYNOPSIS', '1. INTRODUCTION AND RATIONALE', '2. STUDY OBJECTIVES AND ENDPOINTS', '3. STUDY DESIGN', '4. PATIENT SELECTION', '5. STUDY TREATMENTS', '6. STUDY ASSESSMENTS', '7. STATISTICAL ANALYSIS PLAN', and '8. ETHICAL CONSIDERATIONS'. Apply 'Heading 2' style to all numbered sub-section headers throughout the document. Insert a Table of Contents at the beginning of the document before the title. In sub-section 6.1 Schedule of Assessments, insert a table with at least 3 columns and 6 data rows representing the visit schedule from the protocol. Add a footer to all pages containing the text 'CONFIDENTIAL - HRZ-NSCLC-301 - For Regulatory Use Only'. Save the final file as 'oncology_protocol_final.docx' in the Desktop\WordTasks folder.
